title: No-Recipe Cooking Challenge
description: We pick up some fresh ingredients and try to invent a new Asian or Italian fusion dish from scratch. No recipes allowed.

title: Victorian Era Vibes & Coffee
description: I'll brew up a light-roast French press with a little rose syrup. We can sip, relax, and maybe play a round of chess.

title: Spanish Fork Canyon Exploration
description: A drive and a hike up the canyon to explore. We can look for cool bugs, take photos, and just enjoy the outdoors.

title: Local Museum or Gallery
description: Spend the afternoon walking through a local museum or art gallery, learning something entirely new.

title: At-Home Movie Marathon
description: Blankets, popcorn, and a double feature of movies we've never seen before.
